target: desktop 1440px only; mobile QA intentionally skipped
implemented: Officer now stores commandFatigue as a persistent campaign stat.
Save migration/current normalization upgrades local saves to v5 and backfills commandFatigue: 0.
recoverOfficers reduces command fatigue each campaign recovery pass.
officerCommandProfile applies command-fatigue penalties to morale, condition, control radius, reserve readiness, and fallback timing.
applyBattleResult adds fatigue from brigade command, division command, battle outcome pressure, risk, and staff/division duty load.
Army Camp and Officers screens display command fatigue, and Officers shows multiple recent history lines so fatigue entries do not hide division-command history.

flow: open Army Camp and verify save v5 plus initial fatigue 0
